health_conditions: anxiety or psychiatric condition requiring clonazepam and zolpidem

benefits.description: Able to reduce reliance on clonazepam and zolpidem; medications work again but at lower doses needed for same effect; tapering off psychiatric drugs
Improved endurance and recovery time noticed

side_effects.description: Difficulty sleeping; clonazepam and zolpidem had no effect initially, could stay awake for hours after taking them

protocol_notes: OP discovered that waiting 4 hours (after BPC-157 half-life) allowed medications to work again. With continued use, medications became effective again at lower doses. OP views this as a positive outcome allowing tapering off benzodiazepines.
